Singh?
Raja Shri Nandan Singh.
2875
Flashcards
Name the two sons of Raja Kamalanand 
Singh recorded in the text.
Kumar Kamalanand Singh and Kumar 
Kalikanand Singh.
2876
Flashcards
Which individual in the Alay branch was 
identified as a 'Tantrik Babu'?
Nityanand Singh.
2877
Flashcards
Raja Padmanand Singh was the father of 
which Kumar?
Kumar Chandranand Singh.
2878
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Raja 
Kalanand Singh?
Kumar Ramanand Singh and Kumar 
Krishnanand Singh.
2879
Flashcards
In the Niun lineage, who was the son of 
Javali?
Purivya.
2880
Flashcards
Who was the father of Purivya (alias 
Janakinath)?
Raghav.
2881
Flashcards
Purivya was the father of which three 
individuals in the Lalganj record?
Kanhai, Ganganath, and Hemnath.
2882
Flashcards
Who was the father of M.M. Krishnadatt 
in the Budhwal branch?
Devnath.
2883
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Hemnath 
mentioned in the Lalganj Sodaripur 
record?
Murari (alias Premnath) and Manohari (alias 
Mahinath).
2884
Flashcards
Who was the father of Maho Yunnath 
and Anantanand?
Maho Jaynath.
2885
Flashcards
Name the father of the five brothers 
Kashinath, Goloknath, Gokulnath, 
Poshnath, and Sadananda.
Anantanand (alias Shaktinath).
2886
Flashcards
Who was the father of Premnath, 
Vijaynath, and Birendranath in the 
Lalganj branch?
Kashinath.
2887
Flashcards
Who were the four sons of Poshnath?
Kalanath, Indranath, Punyanath, and Machinath.
2888
Flashcards
Gokulnath was the father of which three 
individuals?
Lalitnath, Parthivnath, and Maynath.
2889
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Goloknath?
Ravindranath and Narendranath.
2890
Flashcards
Who was the father of Kumar Ruranath? Raja Tanknath.
2891
Flashcards
Saptaminath (alias Jayarinath) was the 
son of whom?
M.M. Shashthinath.
2892
Flashcards
Who was the father of the scholar 
Kumudnath?
Vaiya. Punyanath.
2893
Flashcards
Kumudnath was the father of which 
three individuals?
Amarnath, Mohan, and Bodhnath.
2894
Flashcards
Who was the father of Gauri, Shanker, 
Harishanker, and Sushila?
Maho Gotrupnath.
2895
Flashcards
Akamnath was the father of which son?
Rewanath.
2896
Flashcards
Who were the three sons of Jibach 
mentioned in the Digunth branch?
Satish Chandra, Harish Chandra, and Ganesh 
Chandra.
2897
Flashcards
In the Digunth branch, Shivanand was 
the father of which three individuals?
Bholanand, Jhotan (alias Kamalanand), and Kali 
(alias Krishnanand).
2898
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Satya Narayan?
Hari Narayan and Laxmi Narayan.
2899
Flashcards
Who was the father of Vishwanath in the 
Digunth-Bhattapura branch?
Hari Narayan.
2900
Flashcards
Who was the father of Kewalanand?
Vishwanath.
2901
Flashcards
Vilat was the father of which four sons?
Ramanand, Balbhar, Yogananad, and 
Mokshanand.
2902
Flashcards
Who was the father of Bhola, Kishore, 
and Keshav in the Digunth lineage?
Shyamnath.
2903
Flashcards
Gosai, Feku, and Bachkana were the 
sons of which individual?
Kishore (alias Matidatta).
2904
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Gosai in the 
Digunth record?
M.M. Devendra (alias Balakrishna) and 
Mahendra.
2905
Flashcards
Who was the father of Lekhdatt, 
Gopidatt, Vachaspati, and Duna (alias 
Murari)?
M.M. Devendra.
2906
Flashcards
Who was the father of Dinanath in the 
Digunth record?
Bucha (alias Kishorenath).
2907
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Gopidatt?
Hira and Vinod.
2908
Flashcards
Vachaspati was the father of which two 
sons?
Jivesh and Rajesh.
2909
Flashcards
Who was the father of Ashutosh in the 
Bhattapura record?
Jivesh.
2910
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Murari (alias 
Tuna)?
Vijay and Ajay.
2911
Flashcards
Prof. Govind and Prof. Jagdish were the 
sons of which individual?
Mahendra (alias Mahi).
2912
Flashcards
Prof. Govind and Prof. Jagdish are noted 
for their contributions to which literary 
field?
Maithili Sahitya (Literature).
2913
Flashcards
Who was the father of Uday?
Prof. Govind.
2914
Flashcards
Who was the father of Anurag?
Prof. Jagdish.
2915
Flashcards
Feku was the father of which two sons?
Ramkrishna and Jaykrishna.
2916
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Ramkrishna?
Devnath and Thatkan.
2917
Flashcards
Who was the father of Yunath in the 
Digunth branch?
Madhav.
2918
Flashcards
Khagdatt was the son of which 
individual?
Jhajhingur (alias Taradatt).
2919
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Khagdatt?
Gudar and Madan.
2920
Flashcards
Ganesh was the father of which three 
brothers?
Devesh, Shailesh, and Mithilesh.
2921
Flashcards
Who was the father of Achyutnath and 
Eknath in the Sodaripur record?
Gopinath.
2922
Flashcards
Indranand was the father of which two 
individuals?
Achyutanand and Nandlal.
2923
Flashcards
Who was the father of Vishwanath in the 
Sodaripur-Karimaha branch?
Shivanand.
2924
Flashcards
Who was the father of Dwarikanath?
Vaiya. Shobhanath.
2925
Flashcards
Raja Fateh Narayan Singh was the father 
of which Raja?
Raja Giridhar Narayan.
2926
Flashcards
Who was the father of Yadav in the 
Darbhanga lineage?
Laxminath.
2927
Flashcards
Punya dhar was also known by what 
other name?
Baidyanath.
2928
Flashcards
What is the primary subject matter of the 
'Panji Prabandh' system detailed in the 
source?
The genealogical records and lineages of Maithil 
Brahmins.
2929
Flashcards
In the context of the Maithil Panji 
records, what does the term 'Suto' (or 
'Sut') signify?
Son.
2930
Flashcards
In the genealogical entries, what specific 
relationship is indicated by the term 
'Suta'?
Daughter.
2931
Flashcards
What does the abbreviation 'U.T.' 
(Uptip) represent in the document 
structure?
A sub-branch or supplementary genealogical 
note within a lineage.
2932
Flashcards
The term 'Gram' frequently appearing 
before village names translates to _____.
Village.
2933
Flashcards
In Panji terminology, what specific 
ancestral connection does 'Dau' indicate?
The grandson of the maternal lineage (daughter's 
son).
2934
Flashcards
According to section 49, the 'Digaundh' 
lineage is primarily associated with 
which village?
Kachua.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
2935
Flashcards
Which lineage is the focus of the records 
starting in section 52?
Kanhuli.
2936
Flashcards
Section 56 describes the 'Mani' lineage 
as originating from which village?
Sarisab (Sodarpur).
2937
Flashcards
The 'Hati' lineage, discussed in section 
59, is linked to which primary village 
branch?
Sodarpur.
2938
Flashcards
Which lineage is extensively detailed 
starting from section 62, including 
branches like Pali and Isahpur?
Mahishi.
2939
Flashcards
Identify the prominent scholar from the 
Mahishi (Isahpur Pali) branch who 
served as the Vice Chancellor of 
Allahabad University.
Dr Sir Ganganath Jha.
2940
Flashcards
Dr Sir Ganganath Jha was a member of 
the _____ branch of the Mahishi lineage.
Isahpur Pali.
2941
Flashcards
What high academic title was held by Dr 
Sir Ganganath Jha as per section 73?
Mahamahopadhyaya.
2942
Flashcards
Who was the son of Dr Sir Ganganath 
Jha that achieved fame at Oxford 
University and also served as VC of 
Allahabad University?
Dr Amarnath Jha.
2943
Flashcards
Which member of the Jha family from 
the Mahishi lineage served as the Deputy 
Governor of Delhi Town?
Dr Vibhutinath Jha.
2944
Flashcards
Identify the military/administrative title 
associated with Dr Vibhutinath Jha in 
section 73.
L. Colonel.
2945
Flashcards
The village 'Khandabala' is frequently 
cited as a source of marriage or maternal 
links; what is its general function in the 
text?
A lineage location for maternal grandfathers 
(Ddau) or related kin.
2946
Flashcards
According to section 50, who were the 
two sons of Ugranand from the 
Digaundh lineage?
Yashodanand and Lilanand.
2947
Flashcards
Which village is associated with the 
'Ujan' branch of the Kanhuli lineage?
Mangarouni.
2948
Flashcards
In section 53, the Kanhuli branch 
records 'Punyadatt' as being the son of 
_____.
Himatdatt.
2949
Flashcards
Which specific scholar in the Mani 
lineage is referred to as 'Shastrarth 
Martand'?
Ganesh Jha (son of Sadashiv).
2950
Flashcards
Who was the father of the scholar 
Markandeya Jha in the Mani lineage?
Ganesh Jha.
2951
Flashcards
Section 57 mentions 'Vidhyapati' as the 
son of which individual in the Mani 
lineage?
Vachaspati Jha.
2952
Flashcards
In the Mahishi lineage records (Section 
62), who are the two sons of 
Lakshminarayan?
Bhikari and Fakir.
2953
Flashcards
According to section 66, 'Hemnath' from 
the Mahishi lineage is associated with 
the village _____.
Isahpur Pali.
2954
Flashcards
Who was the father of the scholar 
Bhavnath Jha mentioned in the Isahpur 
Pali branch (Section 73)?
Dr Sir Ganganath Jha.
2955
Flashcards
What academic position did Dr 
Amarnath Jha hold at Oxford University?
Proof (Professor/Scholar).
2956
Flashcards
The 'Pachhi' village is noted in section 
63 as a location for which administrative 
family?
Babu Chandrapramit Singh of Khandabala.
2957
Flashcards
In the context of the text, 'M.M.' is an 
abbreviation for the traditional title 
_____.
Mahamahopadhyaya.
2958
Flashcards
Section 52 lists 'Shaktidatt' as the son of 
_____ in the Kanhuli lineage.
Purandhar.
2959
Flashcards
Which village is linked to the 'Pabitola' 
branch of the Mahishi lineage in section 
72?
Mahishi.
2960
Flashcards
Who served as the Vice Chancellor of 
Allahabad University after Sir Ganganath 
Jha according to the Mahishi genealogy?
Dr Amarnath Jha.
2961
Flashcards
In section 56, 'Vamdev' is identified as 
the son of _____ from the Mani lineage.
Krishnanand.
2962
Flashcards
The 'Lohna' village is mentioned in 
section 71 as a branch of which major 
lineage?
Mahishi.
2963
Flashcards
According to section 60, 'Gaurinath' had 
four sons: Shankar, Damodar, 
Durgadhar, and _____.
Shrikrishna.
2964
Flashcards
The 'Ddau' for many individuals in the 
Mahishi lineage is frequently noted as 
being from the village _____.
Khandabala.
2965
Flashcards
Who was the father of Shaktinanandan 
Jha in the Isahpur branch (Section 67)?
Maheshnath.
2966
Flashcards
Section 69 mentions 'Gulh' (alias 
Dharidhar) as being the son of _____.
Vanshidhar.
2967
Flashcards
In section 59, 'Bambhollak' is recorded 
as the son of which individual?
Kulmani.
2968
Flashcards
The lineage associated with the village 
'Mahuakhoal' in section 49 is _____.
Digaundh.
2969
Flashcards
Who were the four daughters of 
Raghunandan mentioned in section 50?
Mahavir, Motinandan, Devkinandan, and 
Mayanandana.
2970
Flashcards
Which member of the Jha family is 
associated with the 'Ganganath Jha 
Kendriya Sanskrit Vidyapeeth' 
(contextually implied by the lineage 
titles)?
Dr Sir Ganganath Jha.
2971
Flashcards
In section 52, 'Gangeshdatt' is the son of 
_____.
Shivdatt.
2972
Flashcards
Which individual from the Mani lineage 
is credited with a Ph.D. and D.Litt. in 
section 56?
Professor Vishveshwar Jha.
2973
Flashcards
The 'Isahpur' branch is a sub-division of 
the _____ lineage.
Mahishi.
2974
Flashcards
According to section 68, 'Umanath' and 
'Shambhunath' were the sons of _____.
Durganath.
2975
Flashcards
Which village is the primary residence 
for the 'Bhattapura' branch of the Mani 
lineage (Section 57)?
Sarisab.
2976
Flashcards
Who was the father of the three sons 
Ramji, Bhagwan Ji, and Sudarshan in the 
Mahishi lineage (Section 65)?
Varinath Jha.
2977
Flashcards
Section 55 notes that the 'Kanhuli' 
lineage has a sub-note regarding the 
village _____.
Ujan.
2978
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Chandi-datt 
mentioned in section 52.
Lekhdatt and Anantanand.
2979
Flashcards
In section 49, 'Koushalayanand' is 
recorded as the son of _____.
Krishnanand.
2980
Flashcards
What was the administrative role of Dr 
Amarnath Jha at Allahabad University?
Vice Chancellor (V.C.).
2981
Flashcards
Which individual is described as a 
'Sahastra Gayatri Japakarta' (one who 
chanted Gayatri a thousand times) in 
section 72?
Naimishik Dharanath.
2982
Flashcards
The 'Sodarpur' lineage records in section 
61 are divided into which two sub-
groups?
Katka and Gangoli.
2983
Flashcards
In the context of the Maithil Panji 
records, what does the term 'Suta' or 
'Suto' represent?
It refers to the son of the individual named.
2984
Flashcards
According to section 2.30, who is the 
son of Dr. Adityanath Sakaradhi?
Vaiya Harshnath.
2985
Flashcards
Who is the son of Maheshwar of 
Khandala as per the 'Uptip' records?
Bhavnath Suta.
2986
Flashcards
Identify the son of Purushottam from 
Sodipur mentioned in section 2.30.
Jayanandan.
2987
Flashcards
Who are the sons of Shivnath from 
Kerma according to section 2.30?
Girjanath and Ishnath.
2988
Flashcards
Who is the son of Gopinath from 
Mahishi Pali Pahitole according to 
section (74)?
Krishnaeshwar.
2989
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Sitanath (son 
of Markandeya) listed in section (74)?
Shyamnath, Hiranath, Taranath, and Chandranath.
2990
Flashcards
According to section (74), who is the 
son of Gopinath mentioned after 
Taranath?
Tanranath Jha.
2991
Flashcards
Identify the son of Shivnath who is also 
referred to as 'Manbhar' in section (75).
Umanath.
2992
Flashcards
Who is the son of Umanath (Manbhar) 
as listed in the Mahishi Pali lineage?
Fakir.
2993
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Damodar 
mentioned in the Mahishi Pali records?
Ajuman, Videshwar, and Faturi.
2994
Flashcards
Identify the three sons of Ajuman from 
the Mahishi Pali lineage.
Eknath, Satinath, and Tejnath.
2995
Flashcards
Who is the son of Eknath according to 
section (75)?
Maninath.
2996
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Satinath 
mentioned in the records?
Matinath, Yoganath, and Amritnath.
2997
Flashcards
In section (75), Kalinath and Kalanath 
are identified as the sons of whom?
Tejnath.
2998
Flashcards
Who is the son of Kalinath from the 
Mahishi Pali lineage?
Kamalnath.
2999
Flashcards
According to section (77), who are the 
two sons of Mahi?
Durgadatt and Bhavanidatt.
3000
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Bhavanidatt as 
listed in the 'Uptip' for Mahishi Pali 
(Mangalbani)?
Phalgun, Ajuman, and Lotna.
3001
Flashcards
Identify the four sons of Phalgun 
mentioned in section (77).
Vacha, Kanhai, Gopi, and Govinda.
3002
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Kanhai in the 
Mangalbani lineage?
Shramardhar and Krishnadhar.
3003
Flashcards
According to section (77), who is the 
son of Krishnadhar (also known as 
Babuji)?
Gangadhar.
3004
Flashcards
Who are the five sons of Chandradhar 
(Durgadhar)?
Lakshmidhar, Shridhar, Ramadhar, Manishdhar, 
and Giridhar.
3005
Flashcards
In section (78), who are the sons of 
Pankaj Krishna?
Shrikrishna and Jaikrishna.
3006
Flashcards
Who is the son of Jaikrishna from the 
Lakhanur branch?
Yogkrishna.
3007
Flashcards
Identify the four sons of Jyotishi 
Sonmani mentioned in section (78).
Jyotishi Manbodh, Jyotishi Bhaiyan, Kavi 
Laljhadu, and Laka.
3008
Flashcards
Who are the five sons of Jyotishi 
Bhaiyan Geyan?
Bhavanurami, Amritnath, Kulmani, 
Mathuranath, and Gopinath.
3009
Flashcards
According to section (78), Chetnath is 
identified as the son of whom?
Rami.
3010
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Chetnath?
Parshumani and Raghuvir.
3011
Flashcards
Who is the son of Parshumani in the 
Jamdauli Pali lineage?
Tirthmani.
3012
Flashcards
In section (78), Balbhadra and Dayanath 
are identified as the sons of whom?
Tirthmani.
3013
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Raghudev 
(also called Yar) in the Hariaam branch?
Ramanath, Vishnudatt, Gangadatt, and 
Bhavanidatt.
3014
Flashcards
Identify the son of Ramanath listed in 
section (79).
Kanhai (also known as Ramnatnath).
3015
Flashcards
Who is the son of Kanhai (Ramnatnath) 
according to the Balirajpur-Pahitole 
records?
Kishornath.
3016
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Gangadatt 
listed in section (79)?
Mahinath and Shivnath.
3017
Flashcards
According to section (79), who is the 
son of Mahinath?
Sevanath.
3018
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Sevanath from 
the Balirajpur lineage?
Premnath, Balmukund, Mahavir, and 
Madhusudan.
3019
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Shachinath 
mentioned in section (79)?
Umesh, Sushil, Bindunath, and Yoganath.
3020
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Mahmopadhyaya 
Sachal (Bhavanidatt) in section (81).
Khagdatt and Durgadatt.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
3021
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Khagdatt listed 
in section (81)?
Devnath and Teknath.
3022
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Devnath from 
the Balirajpur branch?
Vaidyanath and Jagannath.
3023
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Vaidyanath 
mentioned in section (81).
Umanath and Vishwanath.
3024
Flashcards
According to section (82), who are the 
two sons of Mishra Durgadatt?
Babu Loknath and Babu Murali (Girijanath).
3025
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Babu Loknath 
listed in the records?
Thithar and Yunath.
3026
Flashcards
Identify the five sons of Yunath Mishra 
as listed in section (82).
Anand, Govind, Haridev, Sukhdev, and Jaidev.
3027
Flashcards
Who are the five sons of Gopinath 
Mishra listed in section (82)?
Sushilnath, Bhaktinath, Ashoknath, Vijaynath, 
and Jitunath.
3028
Flashcards
Who are the five sons of Jaidev 
mentioned in section (83)?
Muktinath, Bednath, Buddhinath, Siddhinath, 
and Riddhinath.
3029
Flashcards
According to section (83), Hemnath is 
the son of whom?
Muktinath.
3030
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Babu Murali 
(Girijanath) mentioned in section (83)?
Taranath, Bhola (Tulanath), and Nena (Harinath).
3031
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Bhola 
(Tulanath) as per section (84)?
Lakshminath, Ram (Dihnath), Lakshman 
(Dimbhnath), and Bharat (Balbhadra).
3032
Flashcards
Identify the three sons of Lakshminath in 
the Balirajpur lineage.
Raghunath, Mathuranath, and Kedarnath.
3033
Flashcards
Who is the son of Raghunath according 
to section (84)?
Meghanath.
3034
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Bharat 
(Balbhadra) mentioned in section (84)?
Tejnath and Kripanath.
3035
Flashcards
According to section (85), who are the 
three sons of Somnath (Chitan)?
Madan, Sadan, and Bodhnath.
3036
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Mahmopadhyaya 
Mohan mentioned in section (85).
Abhaynath and Siddhinath.
3037
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Abhaynath 
listed in the records?
Harshnath and Gopinath.
3038
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Harshnath 
mentioned in section (85)?
Ganganath, Durganath, and Prajanath.
3039
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Durganath 
(Pachchi) mentioned in section (87).
Kumudnath and Dinanath.
3040
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Kumudnath 
(Pachchi) according to the Balirajpur 
records?
Sitanath, Brajnath, and Lilanath.
3041
Flashcards
According to section (88), who is the 
son of Mishra Manik?
Goshai.
3042
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Mishra Goshai? Damodar and Ugari.
3043
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Damodar as per 
section (88).
Muktinath and Pulakit.
3044
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Pulakit 
(Bhavnath) listed in section (88)?
Yantranath, Matinath, Punyanath, and Tejnath.
3045
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Ugari Mishra 
listed in section (89)?
Kunjbihari and Brajbihari.
3046
Flashcards
According to section (89), who is the 
son of Kunjbihari?
Avadhbihari (Thakur) and Balbhadra.
3047
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Brajbihari 
Mishra mentioned in section (89).
Dhaneshwar and Tameshwar.
3048
Flashcards
Who is the son of Prabhu Nath 
mentioned in section (89)?
Chandranath.
3049
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Shyamnath 
listed in section (89)?
Ranglal and Nirmlal.
3050
Flashcards
According to section (93), who are the 
two sons of Ullah Mishra?
Urbidhar and Giridhar.
3051
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Urbidhar listed 
in the records for Behat?
Kirtidhar and Bhagavandatt.
3052
Flashcards
Identify the three sons of Giridhar listed 
in section (94).
Damodar, Madanmohan, and Khadgadhar.
3053
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Giridhar 
mentioned as an alternative set in section 
(94)?
Mahidhar, Satyadhar, and Kamaladhar.
3054
Flashcards
Who is the son of Madanmohan Mishra 
listed in section (94)?
Narsingh.
3055
Flashcards
According to section (94), who is the 
son of Mahidhar?
Bheshadhar.
3056
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Bheshadhar 
listed in the Behat records?
Mahavir and Kanhai.
3057
Flashcards
Who are the five sons of Babu Halli 
(Haladhar) in section (95)?
Phanidhar, Lakshmidhar, Chunni (Shridhar), 
Jyotishi Kalyanidhar, and Parshuram.
3058
Flashcards
According to the Panji records, which 
branch of the Maithil Brahmins is the 
focus of section $2.40$?
The Ujan branch from the Ruchauli lineage.
3059
Flashcards
Who was the father of Jagadvit M. 
Shyam in the Sodipur lineage?
Manbodh.
3060
Flashcards
In the context of the Panji genealogy, 
what does the abbreviation 'M.M.U.' 
signify?
Mahamahopadhyaya, a high scholarly title.
3061
Flashcards
From which village did the scholar 
Dharmadatta originate, as mentioned in 
the Ruchauli Ujan records?
Pali.
3062
Flashcards
Who is listed as the son of Manbodh's 
daughter in the Sodipur lineage (ref 
$100//4$)?
Haritrashva.
3063
Flashcards
The son of Ratnakar, who was a 
Mahopadhyaya in the Sodipur lineage, 
was named _____.
Jagalaxmi.
3064
Flashcards
From which village did Mahopadhyaya 
Dharmadatta's son, Khagesh, originate?
Pali.
3065
Flashcards
Who was the son of Mahipati, listed 
under the Nariun lineage in section 
$2.40$?
Kulapati.
3066
Flashcards
In the genealogical branch of Alay, who 
is identified as the son of Raja 
Shrinandan Singh?
Harihi.
3067
Flashcards
Which specific village is associated with 
the lineage of Bhavanidatta's son, 
Ishadatta?
Khandavala.
3068
Flashcards
According to the Ujan records, who was 
the father of the legal professional 
(Vakeel) Jagdish?
Narsingh.
3069
Flashcards
In the genealogy of the Sodipur lineage, 
_____ was the son of Laxmidatta.
Manbodh.
3070
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of 
Mahamahopadhyaya Subodh (also 
known as Bhavanidatta)?
Ishadatta and Maheshdatta.
3071
Flashcards
To which village does the lineage of 
Damodar, son of Bhavadatta, belong?
Ekhara.
3072
Flashcards
In the Panji system, the term 'Dauhitra' 
(abbreviated as 'Dau') refers to a _____.
Grandson through a daughter.
3073
Flashcards
Who is the 'Vayakarana' (Grammarian) 
mentioned in the Sodipur branch of the 
Ruchauli lineage?
Pitambar.
3074
Flashcards
In section $102$, Rajaram's son, who 
was from the Mandi branch, was named 
_____.
Dhananath.
3075
Flashcards
From which village did the sons of 
Vednathâ€”Medhanath and 
Shrimantâ€”originate?
Nariun.
3076
Flashcards
In the Khandavala lineage, who was the 
father of Maharaj Kumar Bhaveshwar 
Singh?
Gureshwar Singh.
3077
Flashcards
Which daughter of Vayakarana Pitambar 
was associated with the Sodipur lineage 
through Amritnath?
Sadanand.
3078
Flashcards
Who was the son of Raja Ramlochan 
mentioned in section $108$?
Chandra Lochan (or Raja Durgaprasad).
3079
Flashcards
The Behat lineage records identify the 
son of Jagannath as _____.
Narayan Datta (or Bhavani Datta).
3080
Flashcards
Who was the son of Kavi Venidatta in 
the Behat lineage?
Pyarelal (or Shridatta).
3081
Flashcards
From which village did the grandson 
(Dauhitra) of Bhavanidatta, named 
Krishnadatta, originate?
Sodipur.
3082
Flashcards
In the lineage of Behat, who were the 
two sons of Mune and Bounu?
Raghunath and Shyamlal.
3083
Flashcards
The scholar identified as 'Vaiya' 
(Vayakarana) Uma in section $104$ 
belonged to the _____ lineage.
Nariun.
3084
Flashcards
Who was the son of Mahamahopadhyaya 
Subodh mentioned in the branch of 
Darihara?
Bhavanidatta.
3085
Flashcards
In the context of Panji Prabandh, the 
time period covered by the genome 
mapping is from $450$ AD to _____.
$2009$ AD.
3086
Flashcards
Who was the son of Jivnath in the Behat 
lineage (section $112$)?
Indranath.
3087
Flashcards
The daughter of Gureshwar Singh in the 
Khandavala lineage married _____.
Bhaveshwar Singh.
3088
Flashcards
In the Tarauni branch (section $122$), 
who were the two sons of Kalidatta?
Veni and Batuki.
3089
Flashcards
Who was the son of Raja Buddhinath in 
the Khandavala lineage (section $108$)?
Raja Chhatranath (or Raja Tanknath).
3090
Flashcards
Which village is associated with the 
lineage of Hemkar, son of Gokhulnath?
Khowal.
3091
Flashcards
In the Behat branch, who was the father 
of the daughter married to Bharat and 
Shatrughna?
Bhayan.
3092
Flashcards
Who was the son of Maharaj Maheshwar 
Singh in the Khandavala lineage?
Maharajadhiraj Rameshwar Singh Bahadur.
3093
Flashcards
The daughter of Kavi Venidatta in the 
Behat lineage was married into the 
_____ village.
Sarisab.
3094
Flashcards
Who were the three sons of Raja 
Tanknath listed in the Durgaganj branch?
Kumar Karmanath, Kumar Sheshnath, and 
Kumar Rudranath.
3095
Flashcards
In section $106$, who was the son of 
Murlidhar in the Nariun lineage?
Guruanand (or Dharmanath).
3096
Flashcards
The son of Jivnath, named Indranath, 
belongs to the _____ village lineage.
Khandavala.
3097
Flashcards
Who was the son of Mahamahopadhyaya 
Madhusudan in the Tarauni lineage?
Shrinarayan (or Harinarayan).
3098
Flashcards
In the Behat lineage, who were the two 
sons of Laxmidatta?
Murlidhar and Shankardatta.
3099
Flashcards
Which scholar is mentioned as the son of 
Bhavadatta in the Ekhara lineage?
Damodar.
3100
Flashcards
In the Panji records, the term 'Uptip' 
(Sub-note) section $102$ discusses the 
lineage of _____.
Ruchauli Ujan.
3101
Flashcards
Who was the son of Raja Durgaprasad in 
the Behat branch?
Raja Buddhinath.
3102
Flashcards
The Behat lineage records state that the 
son of Gopinath was named _____.
Kumudnath.
3103
Flashcards
Who was the son of Raja Chhatranath 
mentioned in section $109$?
Kumar Baidyanath.
3104
Flashcards
In the context of the Behat branch, who 
was the father of Kavi Venidatta?
Jagannath.
3105
Flashcards
The son of Ratnakar, named Hridaynath, 
belonged to the _____ village lineage.
Sodipur.
3106
Flashcards
Who was the son of Mahipati Singh in 
the Ravandabla branch?
Nanku Singh.
3107
Flashcards
In the Behat lineage, who is listed as the 
son of Venidatta's daughter Pyarelal?
Laturi (or Bachchu).
3108
Flashcards
Who was the son of Mahamahopadhyaya 
Subodh from the Darihara branch?
Bhavanidatta.
3109
Flashcards
In section $111$, the son of 
Bhavanidatta named Krishnadatta was 
from the _____ lineage.
Sodipur.
3110
Flashcards
Who is the son of Jivachh in the Sodipur 
lineage mentioned in section $112$?
Harishchandra Mishra.
3111
Flashcards
In the Panji genealogy, the village 'Pali' 
is associated with the lineage of _____.
Dharmadatta.
3112
Flashcards
Who was the son of Raja Buddhinath's 
daughter married into the Khandavala 
lineage?
Yoganath.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
3113
Flashcards
In the Behat branch, who was the son of 
Radhanath and Shobhanath?
Gopal.
3114
Flashcards
The son of Kumar Rudranath, who was a 
professor, was named _____.
Girindranath.
3115
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Bhagwandatta 
in the Nariun lineage?
Kamladatta and Kalidatta.
3116
Flashcards
In the context of section $121$, who is 
identified as the father of Muktimohan?
Dhodhi (alias Chhanath).
3117
Flashcards
Who was the son of Raja Shrinandan 
Singh in the Alay branch of the Maithil 
Brahmins?
Harihi.
3118
Flashcards
In the context of the 'Panji Prabandh' 
records, what is the meaning of the term 
'Suta' (à¤¸à¥ à¤¤)?
Son.
3119
Flashcards
What does the term 'Upatip' 
(à¤‰à¤ªà¤Ÿà¥€à¤ª) signify in these 
genealogical excerpts?
A sub-note or a branch record within a family 
lineage.
3120
Flashcards
According to the Jhanjharpur lineage, 
who are the two sons of Yoganand?
Shivanand and Vidyanand.
3121
Flashcards
Which individual is identified as the son 
of Babu Harinandan Singh?
Babu Krishnanand Singh.
3122
Flashcards
In the Puvaripar Upatip, Kunjan is 
recorded as having several offspring; 
name any two of them.
Jayanandan and Dinanand.
3123
Flashcards
Who is the son of Jayanandan as 
mentioned in the Puvaripar Jhanjharpur 
records?
Paricheta Devanand.
3124
Flashcards
Shivanand is the father of which 
individual mentioned in the Sakranri 
records?
Vishwanath.
3125
Flashcards
Identify the father of Ravindra and 
Shaktinandan in the Jhanjharpur branch.
Upendra.
3126
Flashcards
Who are the sons of 'Vedic' Tulanand?
Nagendra and Lilanand.
3127
Flashcards
According to the Analpur records, who 
is the son of Teknath?
Jatpadatta.
3128
Flashcards
Which Maharaja is associated with the 
lineage of Eknath in the Analpur section?
Maharaja Madhav Singh.
3129
Flashcards
Lilanath and Churanath are identified as 
the sons of which individual?
Markandeya.
3130
Flashcards
Who are the sons of Somnath mentioned 
in the Analpur Upatip?
Santosh and Ruchal.
3131
Flashcards
The Analpur records mention 'Bachi' and 
'Suraviya' as the sons of _____.
Rurdev.
3132
Flashcards
Vamdev is identified as the son of which 
individual in the Analpur lineage?
Ganga.
3133
Flashcards
Who are the four daughters of Bachru 
mentioned in the Budhwal section?
Lulli, Chunni, Visani, and a fourth implied by 
the group.
3134
Flashcards
In the Gangaura branch, who are the sons 
of Krishnadatta?
Chhathanath and Vidyanath.
3135
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Parashumani 
mentioned in the Budhwal lineage.
Nandishwar and Hariheshwar.
3136
Flashcards
Vatseshwar and Bhaiya are the sons of 
which individual in the Gangaura 
records?
Bachir.
3137
Flashcards
Who are the sons of Shukdev mentioned 
in the Gangaura lineage?
Sitanath and Sachinath.
3138
Flashcards
According to the Gangaura Upatip, who 
are the sons of Vaiya Shiveshwar?
Ganeshiswar and Satishwar.
3139
Flashcards
Which professional title is associated 
with Mantreshwar in the Gangaura 
records?
I.A.S.
3140
Flashcards
Which professional degree is associated 
with Yantreshwar in the Gangaura 
records?
M.B.B.S.
3141
Flashcards
Identify the father of Kumar Jiveshwar 
Singh in the Gangaura branch.
Kumar Vishweshwar Singh.
3142
Flashcards
In the Gangaura lineage, who is the son 
of Tejeswar?
Babulal.
3143
Flashcards
Bhupeshwar and Jaleshwar are the sons 
of which individual in the Lalganj 
records?
Kedar.
3144
Flashcards
Kalanath is recorded as having two sons 
named _____
Umanath and Jayanath.
3145
Flashcards
In the Dumra branch, Gauri Nath is 
identified as the son of _____
Shivnath.
3146
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Gauri Nath in 
the Dumra lineage?
Ganganath and Lalitnath.
3147
Flashcards
Identify the son of Chhathanath 
mentioned in the Dumra records.
Hariswar.
3148
Flashcards
In the Dumra branch, Padmanath and 
Motinath are the sons of _____
Mohan.
3149
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Padmanath in 
the Dumra lineage?
Balmukund and Banmali.
3150
Flashcards
In the Dumra branch, identify the father 
of Rajnath and Shaktinath.
Kedarnath.
3151
Flashcards
Who are the sons of Devkrishna 
mentioned in the Mahua Khoual records?
Laxminath, Giridhari, Matnath, Sheshnath, and 
Padmanath.
3152
Flashcards
Identify the son of Ratanpani who is also 
the father of Vanshi.
Hridayphul.
3153
Flashcards
Who are the sons of Padmanath in the 
Lusamarwar lineage?
Durgadhar and Mohinath.
3154
Flashcards
Gaurinath is identified as the son of 
which individual in the Simrawar 
branch?
Modnath.
3155
Flashcards
In the Simrawar branch, Punyanath is the 
father of which three individuals?
Umanath, Bhavnath, and Laxminath.
3156
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Bhavnath in the 
Simrawar lineage?
Mahinath and Padmanath.
3157
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Lajyanath in the 
Simrawar branch.
Jagdish and Keshav.
3158
Flashcards
In the Simrawar records, who is the 
father of Shashinath and Achyutanath?
Lekhnath.
3159
Flashcards
Naktu is the father of which individual 
in the Parihat lineage?
Vishnudatta.
3160
Flashcards
Identify the sons of Vedic Chandradatta 
in the Parihat branch.
Thethan (Shivdatta) and Markandeya (Phude).
3161
Flashcards
Who are the sons of Satyanarayan in the 
Parihat records?
Shivnarayan and Suryanarayan.
3162
Flashcards
Durgamanand and Harinandan are the 
sons of which individual in the Parihat 
branch?
Kanhai.
3163
Flashcards
Identify the father of Jayakrishna in the 
Parihat branch.
Baiju.
3164
Flashcards
Laxminath is identified as the son of 
which individual in the Sharadapur 
lineage?
Dharanath.
3165
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Kamal Nath 
mentioned in the Parihat branch?
Diva Kant and Radha Kant.
3166
Flashcards
In the Parihat records, Shachinath is 
identified as the son of _____
Rishinath.
3167
Flashcards
Identify the father of Amarnath and 
Jagannath in the Parihat branch.
Tejnath.
3168
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Laxminath in 
the Parihat lineage?
Panchanand and Shrimohan.
3169
Flashcards
In the Parihat branch, who is the son of 
Damodar?
Padmanath.
3170
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Padmanath in 
the Ishahpur lineage?
Sundar and Balaji.
3171
Flashcards
Lilanath is identified as the son of which 
individual in the Ishahpur branch?
Shri Nandan Singh.
3172
Flashcards
In the Ishahpur records, identify the 
father of Ram, Laxman, Bharat, and 
Shatrughna.
Brajmohan.
3173
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Laxman 
mentioned in the Ishahpur records?
Muninath and Umanath.
3174
Flashcards
Amritnath is identified as the father of 
which individual in the Sakranri branch?
Mimirnath.
3175
Flashcards
In the Ratouli branch, who are the two 
sons of Bhavnath?
Chumman and Kumudnath.
3176
Flashcards
Identify the father of Tilanath in the 
Ratouli records.
Chumman.
3177
Flashcards
Which village is frequently cited as the 
origin for the sons of Bhagwan Dutt?
Mandi.
3178
Flashcards
In the Panji records, what does the 
marker 'Dau' (à¤¦à¥Œ) usually refer to?
A genealogical connection to the maternal 
grandfather's lineage (Dauhitra).
3179
Flashcards
Which title is often used for high-
ranking members of the family branches, 
such as Ganeshidutt Singh?
Babu.
3180
Flashcards
In the '311_BatchLM_merge' records, 
what does the abbreviation 'U.Ti.' 
(Upatip) signify in the context of Maithil 
genealogy?
Sub-lineage or branch records of a family.
3181
Flashcards
According to the Ratauli Upatip (2.60), 
who are the three sons of Bandhu's 
daughter?
Bhupnarayan, Yugnarayan, and Yajnanarayan.
3182
Flashcards
In the genealogical records of 
Bhupnarayan, who are his two primary 
sons mentioned?
Durgadutt and Chintamani.
3183
Flashcards
Yajnanarayan is recorded as the father of 
which individual in the Pauraripar 
Ratauli lineage?
Vidyanath.
3184
Flashcards
Who is the father of the individual 
named Nanuk in the Ratauli branch?
Vidyanath.
3185
Flashcards
The sons of Nanuk are recorded as 
Chanchal and _____, also known as 
Toshnath.
Ghurghur.
3186
Flashcards
In the records of Vidyanath's 
descendants, who are the two sons of 
Lochan?
Ananto and Madan Gopal.
3187
Flashcards
According to section 2.60, 
Bhupnarayan's daughter married into 
which family in Ghosaut?
The family of Ram, son of Thakur Hari.
3188
Flashcards
In the lineage of Barinarayan (148), who 
are his two sons?
Ramgovind and Harigovind.
3189
Flashcards
Who is the father of Jitendranarayan in 
the Pauraripar Ratauli lineage?
Harigovind.
3190
Flashcards
Identify the son of Jitendranarayan 
mentioned in the genealogy of section 
148.
Parashar.
3191
Flashcards
Harinarayan's two sons are recorded as 
Jayadharman and _____.
Radhadharman.
3192
Flashcards
In the lineage of Jayadharman, who is his 
son?
Kamal Nayan.
3193
Flashcards
In the record for 'Ananda' (149), who are 
his three daughters?
Ratnananda, Hirananda, and Medhananda.
3194
Flashcards
Who is the son of Hirananda recorded in 
the Maivi branch?
Modananda.
3195
Flashcards
The sons of Babu Phaninanda are 
recorded as Ramananda and _____.
Gunananda.
3196
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Gribananda in 
the lineage of Nityananda?
Maniknandan and Motinandan.
3197
Flashcards
In the lineage of Gribananda, what is the 
name of his son who married into the 
family of Maharaja Madhav Singh?
Chandrananda.
3198
Flashcards
Who is the son of Nikananda mentioned 
in section 150?
Phalananda.
3199
Flashcards
Phalananda is the father of which two 
individuals?
Bodhananda and Dolananda.
3200
Flashcards
In the lineage of Dolananda, who are his 
two sons?
Dayananda and Vidyananda.
3201
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Girijananda 
mentioned in the Lohana branch?
Tarananda and Ambikananda.
3202
Flashcards
Tarananda is the father of which two 
sons?
Bhimananda and Medhananda.
3203
Flashcards
Bhimananda's son is recorded as _____.
Sadananda.
3204
Flashcards
Who is the son of Medhananda in the 
Lohana sub-branch?
Lekhananda.
3205
Flashcards
In the lineage of 'Feku' (Ugrananda), 
who is his son?
Babu Lokananda.
3206
Flashcards
Babu Lokananda's three sons are 
Gokulananda, Mathurananda, and _____.
Mokshananda (also known as Bulin).
3207
Flashcards
Who is the father of Gayananda and 
Purnananda in the Gangoli lineage?
Chirananda (also known as Ghaudhi).
3208
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Purnananda in 
the Gangoli branch.
Vinodananda and Shivananda.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
3209
Flashcards
In the lineage of 'Gopinanda', who is his 
son?
Krishnananda.
3210
Flashcards
Who is the father of the three sons 
Toyananda, Samirananda, and 
Shivananda?
Krishnananda.
3211
Flashcards
The son of Bhairavananda is recorded as 
_____.
Devananda.
3212
Flashcards
Who is the son of Chandrananda, also 
known as Manbhiran?
Machmatnandan.
3213
Flashcards
Machmatnandan (Manbhiran) is the 
father of which individual, also known 
as Lal Gopal Ji?
Vishwananda.
3214
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Gopalji 
mentioned in section 152?
Baldev and Vijay.
3215
Flashcards
In the lineage of Kanhai (Hemnath), who 
is the son who was based in Hariamb?
Bankhandi.
3216
Flashcards
Srinath is the father of which individual, 
mentioned as marrying into the family of 
Kavi Ved-Dutt?
Vabuan.
3217
Flashcards
Identify the son of Jagannath mentioned 
in the Ratauli Ujian branch.
Bhailal.
3218
Flashcards
In the genealogy of Chaturbhuj (153), 
who is his son?
Gopal.
3219
Flashcards
Gopal's son is recorded as the Vedic 
practitioner _____.
Jivanath.
3220
Flashcards
Who is the father of Abhaynath, 
Hridaynath, and Gopinath in the Sarisab 
branch?
Yunnath.
3221
Flashcards
Abhaynath's two sons are recorded as 
Bhivar and _____.
Lala.
3222
Flashcards
Who is the father of Kulananda in the 
Niun branch?
Harshanath.
3223
Flashcards
In the lineage of Hridaynath, who are his 
two sons?
Bhuvanath and Jayanath.
3224
Flashcards
Who is the father of Ramanath in the 
Khondbala branch?
Bhuvanath.
3225
Flashcards
Mahinath's four daughters are named 
Wareshwari, Machireshwari, 
Dharmeshwari, and _____.
Narayani.
3226
Flashcards
In the Gangoli lineage (154), who are 
the two sons of Rudradutt?
Shivlal and Vacha (Chandi Dutt).
3227
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Shivlal in the 
Gangoli branch.
Chitrapati and Damodar.
3228
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Sanphul 
mentioned in section 154?
Kirtinath and Harinath.
3229
Flashcards
Kirtinath's son is recorded as _____.
Ugranath.
3230
Flashcards
In the lineage of Harinath, who are his 
two sons?
Kishorenath and Lilanath.
3231
Flashcards
In the Shishausal Mandar branch (163), 
who are the two sons of Bhurshi?
Khagpati and Raghupati.
3232
Flashcards
Who is the son of Khagpati in the 
Shishausal lineage?
Vachak.
3233
Flashcards
Vachak's four sons are Yagyapati, 
Chandrapati, Yashaspati, and _____.
Haripati.
3234
Flashcards
In the lineage of Yagyapati, who are his 
two sons?
Vuchi and Mukunda.
3235
Flashcards
Identify the three sons of Mukunda in the 
Shishausal branch.
Madhusudan, Kameshwar (Umapati), and 
Phanipati.
3236
Flashcards
Who is the father of Sunil and Ashok in 
the Shishausal branch?
Kameshwar (Umapati).
3237
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Phanipati.
Bhola and Ramesh.
3238
Flashcards
In the lineage of Haripati, who are his 
two sons?
Balbhadra and Kashinath.
3239
Flashcards
Kashinath is the father of which two 
individuals in the Shishausal branch?
Jaykrishna and Amritkrishna.
3240
Flashcards
Who is the father of Jayanand and 
Khelpati in the Shishausal lineage?
Janardana.
3241
Flashcards
According to section 165, Premakar is 
the father of which individual?
Bhaktinath.
3242
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of 'Mahu' 
Durgadhar mentioned in the Shishausal 
lineage?
Nagesh and Vidyadhar.
3243
Flashcards
The genealogist 'Abhinav Murari' 
completed the Ratouli-Darihara records 
on which date?
09 July 2008 (Wednesday).
3244
Flashcards
In the Rajauragram branch (159), who 
are the two sons of Dasharatha?
Ramchandra and Shrikrishna.
3245
Flashcards
Dasharatha also had a son named _____, 
who was from the Sodarpur branch.
Bandhuka.
3246
Flashcards
Who is the father of Rati-pati and Tul-
pati in the Rajauragram lineage?
Kulapati.
3247
Flashcards
In the lineage of Damodar, who are his 
two sons?
Nandipati and Chatrapati.
3248
Flashcards
Nandipati's three sons are Chiranjeev, 
Ratanjeev, and _____.
Tulapati.
3249
Flashcards
Who is the father of Mahaveer and 
Mohit in the Rampur branch (160)?
Ramananda.
3250
Flashcards
In the lineage of Gopal (Vabue), his son 
is recorded as _____.
Lakshmana (Pradyumna).
3251
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Vachhu in the 
Rampur branch?
Yugandhara, Bhola, and Kantuka.
3252
Flashcards
Yugandhara's son is recorded as _____.
Devananda.
3253
Flashcards
In the Rampur lineage, who is the father 
of Brajananda, Harshananda, 
Chandrananda, and Dharmananda?
Devananda.
3254
Flashcards
In the context of the Panji Prabandh 
genealogical records, what does the term 
'Sut' denote?
It is used to denote a 'son' in the lineage.
3255
Flashcards
In the Maithil genealogical system, what 
does the abbreviation 'Dau' (Dauhitra) 
specifically represent?
It represents the maternal lineage, specifically a 
grandson through a daughter.
3256
Flashcards
What is the primary meaning of the term 
'Mool' within the Maithil Brahmin 
genealogical system?
It refers to the original ancestral village or the 
primary lineage of a family.
3257
